8:30PM CBB: Abilene Christian Vs. Southern Utah
Picks:
AC -3.5 -112 5U (Fu)
AC TTO 76.5 -111 3U (FD)
SUU TTU 73.5 -120 3U (FD)
AC 1H -1.5 -118 3U (FD)

8:30PM CBB: Abilene Christian Vs. Southern Utoh

Dating back to February of 2024, Abilene Christian has
absolutely owned this matchup against Southern Utch
ACU has won each of the fost three meetings, taking every
game by at least 9 points. Lost season alone, they beat
SUU twice by a margin of 14 points in both contests. That
gap has not closed this year. Abilene Christian enters at
10-8 on the season, while Southern Utah sits at a miserable
§-13, and the on-court profiles suggest this separation may
be even wider.

In conference play, Abilene Christian is scoring 73 PPG
while operating with controlled volume at fust 52 FGA per
game. They cre shooting 33% from three and converting
46 threes per game, and tonight those numbers ore
positioned to rise against o Southern Utah defense that has
completely fallen apart. SUU is surrendering 67 FGA per
game in conference, allowing opponents to shoot 43% from
three and knock down 8&6 threes per gome. That defensive
inefficiency hos resulted in 84 PPG allowed on 46%
shooting, and now they face an ACU offense shooting 50%
from the field in conference ploy.

On the other end, Southern Utah is scoring 75 PPG in
conference despita needing heavy volume to get ther,
hoisting GO FGA ond relying on 9 made threes per game.
That profite runs directly into an Abilene Chsistian defense
that limits both looks and makes. ACU is surrendering just
52 FGA and 6.5 mode threes per game in conference play.
While they hove allowed 76 PPG, opponents are benefiting
from elevated shooting percentages that are unlikely to
sustain against o Southern Utoh offense shooting just 43%
from the field and 36% from three in conference.

Beyond the efficiency gap on both ends of the ficor,
Southem Utah is at a mojor disadvontage on the glass.
SUU ranks just 322nd nationally in total rebound
percentage, while Abilene Christian ranks 211th. That edge
in extra possessions, combined with ACU’s offensive
efficiency and SUU's defensive collapse, puts this game in
a position to get out of hand quickly. Expect Abilene
Christian to control this matchup throughout and pull away
convincingly.
